title: Wooly's Immersive Modpack
description: Large modpack designed for immersive group play, with different roles from Origins mods, and building with the Create and CRF mods, and a coin based economy from DotCoin mods.
body:
Large modpack designed for immersive group play, with different roles from Origins mods, and building with the Create and CRF mods.

This is designed to be a multiplayer server where cooperative play is encouraged with mods like Origins.  I has a coin based economy, based on the DotCoins mod.  The intention is to play on Survival mode and make trading an essential part of the gun.

The following mods have been included with this modpack:

SpaceCat Mods:
Dot Coin Mod 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dotcoin-mod

Custom Villager Trades
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-villager-trades

Custom Professions
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-villager-professions-fabric




Conquest Reforged Mods:

Conquest Reforged Mod
https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged

Conquest Recipes
https://modrinth.com/mod/conquestrecipes




Vanilla Tweaks
https://vanillatweaks.net/

Create Mod
https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric

Origins Mod
https://modrinth.com/mod/origins
